privileged_info_summary: The task imports two synthetically-generated video files into Nx Witness VMS (a CCTV/surveillance management system). The videos are programmatically created in the setup phase: bystander_clip_01.mp4 (720x1280, 15s, 30fps) and drone_survey_clip.mp4 (1920x1080, 15s, 60fps) using ffmpeg with test pattern generators. Both files are located in /home/ga/Downloads/Evidence. The agent must rename these files to 'Exhibit A - Bystander' and 'Exhibit B - Drone' respectively, create a layout named 'Case #4492-Investigation', add both videos to the layout, and arrange them side-by-side.
